description_long: This armchair features a boxy, geometric design with wide, flat armrests and a high, angular backrest. The exterior surface is covered in a dark, woven rattan or wicker-like texture, giving it a robust and weather-resistant appearance suitable for outdoor or urban environments. The seat is broad and flat, with no visible separate cushions, and the armrests are thick and rectangular, matching the overall blocky aesthetic. The backrest rises above the armrests and has a slightly faceted, polygonal shape, adding a modern touch. The base of the armchair is solid and extends to the ground, with no visible legs, suggesting stability and durability. The color is a deep charcoal or black, with a subtle checkered pattern from the woven material.
description: A boxy, dark rattan-textured armchair with wide flat armrests, a high angular backrest, and a solid base. The design is modern and robust, ideal for outdoor or urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, thick armrests, and high angular backrest with a woven texture.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the solid base extending to the ground.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full height and faceted shape of the backrest, as well as the continuous woven pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the armrest and the straight, blocky profile.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, flat, rectangular, woven rattan texture
attribute_backrest_style: high, angular, faceted, solid woven design
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs, solid block base
